nasb.text: and Benaiah and Jahaziel the priests blew trumpets continually before the ark of the covenant of God.

esv.text: and Benaiah and Jahaziel the priests were to blow trumpets regularly before the ark of the covenant of God.

cnv.text: 比拿雅和雅哈悉兩位祭司在　神的約櫃前不住地吹號。

ccb.text: 比拿雅和雅哈悉两位祭司在上帝的约柜前吹号。
